event: Still life with bread and pumpkin
description: A still life arrangement on a table draped with a white cloth. Several large brown bread loaves stand upright alongside smaller rolls. A large blue ceramic pitcher sits among the breads. A glass or cup is visible beside the pitcher. The background is pale blue-gray. The style is bold and expressive with thick brushstrokes and strong color contrasts between the warm brown breads and the vivid blue of the pitcher.

_meta.title: Still life with bread and pumpkin
